|events=*[[Darth Malak]] unsuccessfully kills his master [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and becomes the new [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]].
*Revan and [[Bastila Shan]]'s [[Force-bond/Legends|Force bond]] is created after Malak betrays Revan, destroying [[Darth Revan's flagship|his ship]] and knocking him into a [[Coma/Legends|coma]].
*Revan's memory is erased by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] and is taken into custody of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] to find the [[Star Forge]].
|eras=[[Old Republic era]]}}
The following events took place in '''3957 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Revan/Legends|Revan]] is betrayed by his apprentice [[Darth Malak]]. [[Bastila Shan]] brings a mentally destroyed Revan back to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to strip his memories and create a new identity for him.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>
*Malak usurps the title of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]].<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

==Battles==
*[[Duel on Revan's flagship]]<ref name="KOTOR GG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
*[[Capture of Darth Revan]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*''[[Darkmoon]]'' is attacked by a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] ship.<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic: Opportunities">''[[Knights of the Old Republic: Opportunities]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}}
